title: poa exigua
intro: Poa exigua, also known as the annual bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa, but has been widely naturalized in other parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Poa exigua include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa exigua include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, and it can be prepared as tea, tincture, or capsule for its herbal benefits.
